title: Iterative Deepening Depth-First Search (IDDFS) Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of IDDFS, which combines depth-first search with a gradually increasing depth limit to achieve optimality like BFS while maintaining the memory efficiency of DFS.
relationships: Process starts with initial node and depth limit d=0
Runs DLS up to current depth limit
Checks if goal is found during DLS
If goal found, returns solution and ends process
If goal not found, increments depth limit and repeats DLS
